SEARCH
Package io.github.javainvaders

Class Alien.Boss

java.lang.Object
io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Enclosing class:
Alien
public static class Alien.Boss extends Object
The level-3 boss. Appears after all regular aliens are dead, descends from the top, then drifts sideways and fires radial bursts of bombs every few seconds. Takes several hits to kill and flashes briefly on each hit.
Author:
Larissa R. G.; Vinicius S. F.

    Field
    Description
    boolean
    alive
    Whether the boss is still alive.
    float
    bobOffset
    Vertical offset on top of BOSS_TARGET_Y - oscillates via sine.

    Accumulated time used to drive the sine-wave vertical bob.

    Amplitude of the vertical bob in pixels.
    static final float
    BOSS_BOB_SPEED
    Full bob cycles per second.

    BOSS_BURST_COUNT
    Number of bombs in each radial burst.
    static final float
    BOSS_DEATH_FLASH_INTERVAL
    Duration of each flash half-cycle in seconds.
    static final int
    BOSS_DEATH_FLASHES
    How many times the boss flashes during its death sequence.
    static final float
    BOSS_DEATH_FREEZE_DURATION
    Seconds the boss holds as a white silhouette before the final explosion.
    static final float
    BOSS_ENTRY_SPEED
    Downward entry speed from the top of the screen.
    static float
    BOSS_FIRE_INTERVAL
    Seconds between radial bomb bursts.
    static final float
    BOSS_H
    Height of the boss sprite.
    static int
    BOSS_MAX_HP
    How many bullets it takes to destroy the boss.
    static final int
    BOSS_SCORE
    Points awarded for killing the boss.
    static float
    BOSS_SPEED_X
    Horizontal drift speed once it reaches its target Y.
    static final float
    BOSS_TARGET_Y
    Y position where the boss stops descending.
    static final float
    BOSS_W
    Width of the boss sprite - roughly 13.5x a normal alien.
    int
    deathFlashesLeft
    How many flash half-cycles remain in the death sequence.
    float
    deathFlashTimer
    Countdown for each individual flash half-cycle.
    float
    deathFreezeTimer
    Countdown for the frozen-silhouette phase.
    boolean
    deathFrozen
    True when all flashes are done and the boss is held as a solid white silhouette for BOSS_DEATH_FREEZE_DURATION before the final explosion.
    boolean
    deathSequenceDone
    True once the death sequence is fully over and the game can award the score, spawn the explosion and proceed to YOU WIN.
    boolean
    deathVisible
    Whether the boss sprite is visible during a death-flash off-frame.
    float
    dirX
    Current horizontal movement direction, +1 or -1.
    boolean
    dying
    True once the boss reaches zero HP and the death sequence begins.
    boolean
    entering
    True while the boss is still entering from the top.
    float
    fireTimer
    Countdown to the next bomb burst.
    float
    hitFlashTimer
    Timer for the hit-flash effect.
    int
    hp
    Remaining hit points.

    RNG
    Shared RNG instance used to vary the burst count each fire cycle.
    float
    shakeOffsetX
    Horizontal shake offset applied while dying.
    float
    x
    Horizontal center of the boss.
    float
    y
    Vertical center of the boss.

    • x

      public float x
      Horizontal center of the boss.

    • y

      public float y
      Vertical center of the boss.

    • hp

      public int hp
      Remaining hit points.

    • alive

      public boolean alive
      Whether the boss is still alive.

    • entering

      public boolean entering
      True while the boss is still entering from the top.

    • dirX

      public float dirX
      Current horizontal movement direction, +1 or -1.

    • fireTimer

      public float fireTimer
      Countdown to the next bomb burst.

    • hitFlashTimer

      public float hitFlashTimer
      Timer for the hit-flash effect.

    • bobTimer

      public float bobTimer
      Accumulated time used to drive the sine-wave vertical bob.

    • bobOffset

      public float bobOffset
      Vertical offset on top of BOSS_TARGET_Y - oscillates via sine.

    • dying

      public boolean dying
      True once the boss reaches zero HP and the death sequence begins. While dying is true, alive is false but the boss is still rendered and updated (flashing, shaking, freeze, final explosion).

    • deathFlashesLeft

      public int deathFlashesLeft
      How many flash half-cycles remain in the death sequence.

    • deathFlashTimer

      public float deathFlashTimer
      Countdown for each individual flash half-cycle.

    • deathVisible

      public boolean deathVisible
      Whether the boss sprite is visible during a death-flash off-frame.

    • shakeOffsetX

      public float shakeOffsetX
      Horizontal shake offset applied while dying.

    • deathFrozen

      public boolean deathFrozen
      True when all flashes are done and the boss is held as a solid white silhouette for BOSS_DEATH_FREEZE_DURATION before the final explosion.

    • deathFreezeTimer

      public float deathFreezeTimer
      Countdown for the frozen-silhouette phase.

    • deathSequenceDone

      public boolean deathSequenceDone
      True once the death sequence is fully over and the game can award the score, spawn the explosion and proceed to YOU WIN.

    • RNG

      private static final Random RNG
      Shared RNG instance used to vary the burst count each fire cycle.

  • Constructor Details

    • Boss

      public Boss(int screenW)
      Creates a boss that starts above the visible screen and descends to its patrol height.
      Parameters:
      screenW - game screen width, used to center the boss

  • Method Details

    • loadConfig

      public static void loadConfig(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.JsonValue config)
      Loads boss config values from JSON data.
      Parameters:
      config - the JSON section containing boss settings

    • rect

      public com.badlogic.gdx.math.Rectangle rect()
      Returns the hitbox for collision checks against player bullets.
      Returns:
      bounding rectangle centered on this boss

    • update

      public void update(float dt, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<Alien.Bomb> bombs, int screenW)
      Updates boss movement, entry descent and the fire timer. Also drives the vertical bob, the death-sequence animation and pushes new bombs into the provided list when it fires.
      Parameters:
      dt - delta time in seconds
      bombs - bomb list to append radial burst into
      screenW - game screen width for wall bounce

    • fireBurst

      private void fireBurst(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<Alien.Bomb> bombs)

    • hit

      public boolean hit()
      Registers a bullet hit. Decrements HP and triggers the hit flash. When HP reaches zero, starts the death sequence (flashes, shake and freeze) instead of removing the boss immediately. Call deathSequenceDone to know when the game can proceed.
      Returns:
      true if this hit reduced HP to zero (death sequence started)

    • draw

      public void draw(com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.glutils.ShapeRenderer shapes)
      Draws the boss using shape primitives. Behavior differs by phase: normal patrol is gold/yellow with bob offset and flashes white on hit; death sequence alternates visible/invisible while shaking sideways; death freeze shows a solid white silhouette with no shake.
      Parameters:
      shapes - active ShapeRenderer (already begun)
